message:
refactor(storage,fmt): rewrite mutate() to delegate to with_write_transaction, formatting fixes

mutate() consolidation (storage/sqlite.rs):
- Rewrite mutate() to delegate its entire transaction lifecycle to
  with_write_transaction() instead of duplicating the BEGIN IMMEDIATE /
  retry / COMMIT / ROLLBACK boilerplate. The closure now receives
  `&mut Self` from with_write_transaction and performs the core mutation,
  event logging, dirty-flag marking, blocked-cache rebuild, and force-flush
  all within the shared transaction wrapper. This eliminates ~80 lines of
  duplicated retry logic that previously existed in both mutate() and
  with_write_transaction().

close.rs cleanup:
- Remove unused IssueType import (the close guard now uses
  issue.issue_type inline without importing the enum variant).

create.rs formatting:
- Restore `created_ids` tracking Vec that was accidentally dropped.
- Fix indentation of the resolve_dependency_id match arm for consistency.

ready.rs cleanup:
- Remove unused find_matching_ids import since resolve_issue_id is now
  called from the shared mod.rs helper which handles it internally.

model/mod.rs:
- Fix trailing whitespace in Duration clamping comment.

util/id.rs formatting:
- Reformat prefix charset validation closure to use standard rustfmt style
  (closing paren on same line as last condition).

util/time.rs formatting:
- Break long format_relative_time() format!() calls into multi-line format
  for readability and to satisfy rustfmt line-length limits.

storage/sqlite.rs test formatting:
- Break long assert_eq! in export hash dedup test across lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
